WelcomeMessage:
CIRCLE is an unarmed civilian crisis response alternative to law enforcement, and serves people experiencing homelessness. 
If violence or weapons are present, call 911 for LAPD response.
PreEngagementPhase-Form-Description:

MessageInputDisabledReasonHold: Thank you very much for this information. We'll transfer you now. Please hold for an operator.
Header-CloseChatButtons-EndChatConfirmDi: End the current chat? This will disconnect you from the service.
MessagePhase-ConversationEnded-Heading: Thanks for submitting a request with us.
MessagePhase-ConversationEnded-Detail: If you have any questions or would like to submit another request, please reach out again.
